objects.label: Sun

objects.label: LSR circular tracer
objects.provenance: synthetic: circular orbit at R0=8.178 kpc, z=0, v_phi=Vc=229.0 km/s (release default variant)

objects.label: Barnard's Star
objects.why: nearest single star; very high proper motion; thick-disc-like orbit

objects.label: Arcturus
objects.why: bright thick-disc giant; the classic 'high-velocity star'
